title: State saltwater fish
doc_html:
§170.7.  State saltwater fish

There shall be an official state saltwater fish.  The official state saltwater fish shall be the spotted sea trout, or speckled trout (Cynoscion nebulosus).  Its use on the official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.

Acts 2001, No. 165, §1.
doc_text:
§170.7.  State saltwater fish
There shall be an official state saltwater fish.  The official state saltwater fish shall be the spotted sea trout, or speckled trout (
Cynoscion nebulosus
).  Its use on the official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.
Acts 2001, No. 165, §1.
